steps.expect: async (response, ctx) => { ctx.agent.setMode('ask'); return [{ok: ctx.agent.getMode().mode === 'ask', message: 'should be in ask mode'}]; }
steps.note: Set mode to ask via direct AgentService call

steps.expect: response => [ {ok: response.blocked === true, message: 'click should be blocked in ask mode'}, {ok: response.mode === 'ask', message: 'response should indicate which mode blocked it'} ]
response => [ {ok: response.ok === true, message: 'read action should still work in ask mode'} ]
async (response, ctx) => { ctx.agent.setMode('agent'); return [{ok: ctx.agent.getMode().mode === 'agent', message: 'should switch back to agent mode'}]; }
response => [ {ok: response.ok === true, message: 'click should now succeed in agent mode'} ]
